_comment: FHIR R4 (HL7 Da Vinci PDEX Plan-Net) Provider Directory base URLs per Medi-Cal plan. CMS-9115-F requires the Provider Directory API to be PUBLIC (no authentication). The map uses a plan's endpoint as the primary in-network source of truth and only falls back to Google/OpenStreetMap when no endpoint is set or it returns nothing. baseUrl is filled ONLY for endpoints firsthand-verified to be live, public, and returning real FHIR data via Location?near geo search. Leave baseUrl empty when unconfirmed; those plans use the Tier-1 directory deep-link + public map data instead.

la-care.notes: Public-no-auth confirmed; Da Vinci PDEX Plan-Net. From lacare.org/technical-information.

phc.notes: Plan states 'open and does not require secure credentials'. Verified live.

iehp.notes: Open API, CapabilityStatement + live Practitioner query with real NPIs verified. CORS enabled.

health-net.notes: FHIR base URL is portal-gated, so we use Health Net's public per-county Medi-Cal provider-directory JSON, flattened + ZIP-centroid geocoded by scripts/build-healthnet.mjs into data/healthnet-providers.json. Pins are approximate to the provider's ZIP area (source has no per-record coordinates).

molina.notes: Public-no-auth verified live (Location total 1.4M, PractitionerRole 16M). Server does NOT support `near` (HTTP 500); uses address-postalcode/address-city, so we reverse-geocode the point to a ZIP. Rate-limits aggressively.

blue-shield-promise.notes: Public-no-auth production endpoint verified live; `near` geo search confirmed working (backend mdc = Medi-Cal directory cloud). Production host api.blueshieldca.com, path /bsc/fhir/ (sandbox uses api-dev + /bsc/fhir-sandbox/).

anthem.notes: metadata public at totalview.healthos.elevancehealth.com/.../AnthemBlueCross/api/v1/fhir but data queries 403 without an API key (request via InteroperabilityWorkgroup@Anthem.com).

gold-coast.notes: Edifecs-hosted PD API asserted on official site but no production base URL published; portal requires registration.

kaiser.notes: No public Provider Directory FHIR endpoint; Medi-Cal directories are regional PDFs. Use Tier-1 deep-link only.

kern.notes: Only a member-consent Patient Access API evidenced; no public Provider Directory endpoint found.
